rationale: Implements both halves of the PR description in Flutter. (1) Navigation fixes: `lib/features/chords/chord_detail_screen.dart` swaps three `context.go(...)` calls (related voicings, style-match chips) for `context.push('/chords/$encoded')`, and the related-scales `ActionChip` now navigates to `context.push('/scales/${Uri.encodeComponent(scale)}')` instead of the bare `/scales` route. `lib/features/chords/chord_library_screen.dart::_ChordCard` likewise replaces `context.go` with `context.push`. (2) Scales expansion: brand new `lib/features/scales/scale_detail_screen.dart` (290 lines) — `ScaleDetailScreen` consumes `scalesViewModelProvider`, decodes the URL path-param `scaleId`, calls `vm.findByName(decodedName)`, computes notes from root + intervals, and renders header + `_PlayScaleButton` + section cards for notes, intervals, description, common usage, and related-chords chips. `scales_viewmodel.dart` adds `final Map<String, Scale> _nameIndex = {};` populated during `_load()` and an `O(1)` `findByName(String name)` lookup. `lib/ui/navigation.dart` adds the `routes: [GoRoute(path: ':id', builder: (_, state) => ScaleDetailScreen(scaleId: state.pathParameters['id']!))]` nested under `/scales`. `_ScaleCard` is converted from `ConsumerWidget` to `StatelessWidget`, drops the inline-expand selection state, and navigates on tap. `_PlayScaleButton` and its `audio_service` import are removed from `scales_screen.dart` (relocated to the detail screen). `app_strings.dart` adds `scaleNotes`, `scaleDescription`, `scaleIntervals` constants. Implementation matches the PR claim.
